data.title: Ecommerce Trends: What is the growth trajectory for North America's top retailers?
data.description: New data and projections from the 2025 Top 1000 report show what ecommerce growth could look like as retailers adjust to tariffs.

data.title: Mattel partners with OpenAI to integrate AI into toy development
data.description: The collaboration also aims to bring new, AI-powered play experiences to market. The first of these products is expected to be unveiled later this year.

data.title: Worksport’s ecommerce monthly revenue tops $1 million
data.description: The company is also continuing to scale its retail footprint, expanding its U.S. dealer network to over 550 locations.

data.title: Walmart introduces its Sparky virtual assistant to new shoppers
data.description: Sparky joins other assistants and agentic commerce efforts at Walmart as it rolls out for use across multiple categories.

data.title: FERMÀT raises $45 million to expand AI ecommerce platform
data.description: Current customers include Unilever’s Olly, Glossier, GNC, BISSELL, Adapt Naturals, ILIA Beauty, and Backcountry.
